name: Quick Stuffing Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons butter buds (chicken broth or vegetarian)
8 ounces corn kernels, whole (rinse and drain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cool onion and celery in 3 tablespoons butter buds or chicken broth until tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in spices and mix well.
4. Remove from heat. Add bread cubes and corn, mixing well.
5. Combine dry ingredients. Add combined milk, liquid butter buds, and egg beaters, mixing just until moistened.
6. Add vegetable mixture. Spread evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pan for 15 minutes before removing and cutting into 3-inch slices. Serve warm.
